analyze_target_type.reason: Target provided is a fully qualified domain name (FQDN) in the .edu.eg TLD.

select_recon_tools.strategy: Domain -> Subdomain Enum -> Port Scan -> Vuln Scan

execution_orchestration.reason: Subdomain enumeration tools (subfinder, amass) must complete to define the attack surface before port scanning (nmap) and directory fuzzing/vulnerability scanning (ffuf) can be performed.
